TEXT.Text: The port is totally isolated because of {C=0xFFFF0011/}Captain Hookah and his troops{C=0xFFFFFFFF/} which are stationed around Port of the Winds.
Map Info Display Text Original Text
Map Info Display Text Original Text
Map Info Display Text Original Text
Map Info Display Text Original Text
Map Info Display Text Original Text
Map Info Display Text Original Text
Map Info Display Text Original Text
Map Info Display Text Original Text
Map Info Display Text Original Text
Captain Hookah's wife, {C=0xFFFF0011/}Alvida{C=0xFFFFFFFF/}, is planning another conspiracy while everyone is after Captain Hookah.
Map Info Display Text Original Text
Map Info Display Text Original Text
Map Info Display Text Original Text
Map Info Display Text Original Text
Map Info Display Text Original Text
Map Info Display Text Original Text
Map Info Display Text Original Text
Map Info Display Text Original Text
Map Info Display Text Original Text

A thousand years ago, there was once a brave knight captain who fought against the dragons. The captain was transformed into a spirit after he was defeated in battle. The bitter spirit is now known as {C=0xFFFF0011/}Artis{C=0xFFFFFFFF/}.
Map Info Display Text Original Text
Map Info Display Text Original Text
Map Info Display Text Original Text
Map Info Display Text Original Text
Map Info Display Text Original Text
Map Info Display Text Original Text
Map Info Display Text Original Text
Map Info Display Text Original Text
Map Info Display Text Original Text

A thousand years ago, there was once a brave captain of the knights who fought against the dragons. The captain was transformed into a spirit after he was defeated in battle. The bitter spirit is now known as {C=0xFFFF0011/}Lord of Night{C=0xFFFFFFFF/}.
The wolves have been acting quite vicious recently. Lylia, the Chief's daughter, was kidnapped by a wolf named {C=0xFFFF0011/}Vagabond{C=0xFFFFFFFF/}.
Map Info Display Text Original Text
Map Info Display Text Original Text
Map Info Display Text Original Text
Map Info Display Text Original Text
Map Info Display Text Original Text
Map Info Display Text Original Text
Map Info Display Text Original Text
Map Info Display Text Original Text
Map Info Display Text Original Text

Just after Vagabond died and the Doctor disappeared with Lylia's dog, a new giant wolf resembling Vagabond appeared. The people who sighted the giant wolf call it {C=0xFFFF0011/}Vegas{C=0xFFFFFFFF/}. Let's find out if there's a connection between Vegas and Lylia's dog.
Map Info Display Text Original Text
Map Info Display Text Original Text
Map Info Display Text Original Text
Map Info Display Text Original Text
Map Info Display Text Original Text
Map Info Display Text Original Text
Map Info Display Text Original Text
Map Info Display Text Original Text
Map Info Display Text Original Text

Guards patrolling the neighbourhood were ambushed by bandits. Bandits and humans used to be on good terms before. What got into them? Defeating the bandit boss {C=0xFFFF0011/}Sanka{C=0xFFFFFFFF/} should lead us to more clues.
Map Info Display Text Original Text
Map Info Display Text Original Text
Map Info Display Text Original Text
Map Info Display Text Original Text
Map Info Display Text Original Text
Map Info Display Text Original Text
Map Info Display Text Original Text
Map Info Display Text Original Text
Map Info Display Text Original Text
Defeating Sanka revealed the fact that he was actually controlled by someone. {C=0xFFFF0011/}Kunka{C=0xFFFFFFFF/}, the ruler of the Canyon of Oblivion might also need some help.
Map Info Display Text Original Text
Map Info Display Text Original Text
Map Info Display Text Original Text
Map Info Display Text Original Text
Map Info Display Text Original Text
Map Info Display Text Original Text
Map Info Display Text Original Text
Map Info Display Text Original Text
Map Info Display Text Original Text
Map Info Display Text Original Text
Map Info Display Text Original Text
The Quartermaster Corps was kidnapped on its way to Ellora Camp! The Mole boss is behind all of this. Take care of {C=0xFFFF0011/}Ahtoo{C=0xFFFFFFFF/} and you'll find the kidnapped soldiers!
Map Info Display Text Original Text
Map Info Display Text Original Text
Map Info Display Text Original Text
Map Info Display Text Original Text
Map Info Display Text Original Text
Map Info Display Text Original Text
Map Info Display Text Original Text
Map Info Display Text Original Text
Map Info Display Text Original Text
Chaos reveals the evil nature of the human world. Here lies the evil spirit of {C=0xFFFF0011/}Captain Hookah{C=0xFFFFFFFF/}.
Map Info Display Text Original Text
Map Info Display Text Original Text
Map Info Display Text Original Text
Map Info Display Text Original Text
Map Info Display Text Original Text
Map Info Display Text Original Text

Map Info Display Text Original Text

Map Info Display Text Original Text
Defeating Farrell revealed the existence of the Magma Drake. However, there is someone who blocks the path to the Drake. Unseal the path by defeating {C=0xFFFF0011/}Chief Rocker{C=0xFFFFFFFF/}.
Map Info Display Text Original Text
Map Info Display Text Original Text
Map Info Display Text Original Text
Map Info Display Text Original Text
Map Info Display Text Original Text
Map Info Display Text Original Text
Map Info Display Text Original Text
Map Info Display Text Original Text
Map Info Display Text Original Text
Map Info Display Text Original Text
Map Info Display Text Original Text
Libra has encountered a problem with its electricity supply. {C=0xFFFF0011/}Queen Vella{C=0xFFFFFFFF/} seems to be directly implicated in the incident.
Map Info Display Text Original Text
Map Info Display Text Original Text
Map Info Display Text Original Text
Map Info Display Text Original Text
Map Info Display Text Original Text
Map Info Display Text Original Text
Map Info Display Text Original Text
Map Info Display Text Original Text
Map Info Display Text Original Text

{C=0xFFFF0011/}Elluman{C=0xFFFFFFFF/} is causing significant damage to local lumbermen. Rumour has it that Elluman was once an outstanding Woodi. Who would have believed that this Woodi's dream of overnight fame would come true?
Map Info Display Text Original Text
Map Info Display Text Original Text
Map Info Display Text Original Text
Map Info Display Text Original Text
Map Info Display Text Original Text
Map Info Display Text Original Text
Map Info Display Text Original Text
Map Info Display Text Original Text
Map Info Display Text Original Text

{C=0xFFFF0011/}Karkarous{C=0xFFFFFFFF/} suddenly turned into a rebel! He and his followers are after the good natured Kentars. Kentars have always taken a neutral stance, whatever the situation, but now they are seeking help.
Map Info Display Text Original Text
Map Info Display Text Original Text
Map Info Display Text Original Text
Map Info Display Text Original Text
Map Info Display Text Original Text
Map Info Display Text Original Text
Map Info Display Text Original Text
Map Info Display Text Original Text

Map Info Display Text Original Text
Map Info Display Text Original Text

{C=0xFFFF0011/}Bubobubo{C=0xFFFFFFFF/} is the King of the Owls but is also known as the Mimir God which is worshipped by the Mimir tribe. Fungus tribe begs to differ and they think that Bubobubo is actually far from being a god.
Map Info Display Text Original Text
Map Info Display Text Original Text
Map Info Display Text Original Text
Map Info Display Text Original Text
Map Info Display Text Original Text
Map Info Display Text Original Text
Map Info Display Text Original Text
Map Info Display Text Original Text
Map Info Display Text Original Text
{C=0xFFFF0011/}Burlune{C=0xFFFFFFFF/} possesses a terrifying power like no other. No one has ever survived after challenging Burlune for his throne.
Map Info Display Text Original Text
Map Info Display Text Original Text
Map Info Display Text Original Text
Map Info Display Text Original Text
Map Info Display Text Original Text
Map Info Display Text Original Text
Map Info Display Text Original Text
Map Info Display Text Original Text
Map Info Display Text Original Text
Nothing specific is known about this creature other than the fact that it was created when a curse was casted upon a glowing core. It destroys all living creatures within its line of sight.
Map Info Display Text Original Text
Map Info Display Text Original Text
Map Info Display Text Original Text
Map Info Display Text Original Text
Map Info Display Text Original Text
Map Info Display Text Original Text
Map Info Display Text Original Text
Map Info Display Text Original Text
Map Info Display Text Original Text

{C=0xFFFF0011/}Arkah{C=0xFFFFFFFF/} used to be an ordinary human being. When she was little, she wanted to look as beautiful as the woman she adores. She made a wish and it suddenly came true. As a consequence, she disappeared for centuries. Arkah suddenly came back and started to lure kids and turned them into fairies like herself.
Map Info Display Text Original Text
Map Info Display Text Original Text
Map Info Display Text Original Text
Map Info Display Text Original Text
Map Info Display Text Original Text
Map Info Display Text Original Text
Map Info Display Text Original Text
Map Info Display Text Original Text
Map Info Display Text Original Text
{C=0xFFFF0011/}Gaiden{C=0xFFFFFFFF/} is the one who guards the first floor. You must defeat him to gain access to the second floor.
Map Info Display Text Original Text
Map Info Display Text Original Text
Map Info Display Text Original Text
Map Info Display Text Original Text
Map Info Display Text Original Text
Map Info Display Text Original Text
Map Info Display Text Original Text
Map Info Display Text Original Text
Map Info Display Text Original Text
{C=0xFFFF0011/}Kimart{C=0xFFFFFFFF/} is the one who guards the second floor. You must defeat him to gain access to the third floor.
Map Info Display Text Original Text
Map Info Display Text Original Text
Map Info Display Text Original Text
Map Info Display Text Original Text
Map Info Display Text Original Text
Map Info Display Text Original Text
Map Info Display Text Original Text
Map Info Display Text Original Text
Map Info Display Text Original Text
{C=0xFFFF0011/}Antares{C=0xFFFFFFFF/} is the one who guards the third floor. You must defeat him to gain access to Drakos.

Map Info Display Text Original Text
Map Info Display Text Original Text
Map Info Display Text Original Text
Map Info Display Text Original Text
Map Info Display Text Original Text
Map Info Display Text Original Text
The ecosystem is being destroyed by an evil lumberjack who cuts down trees mercilessly. The villagers and the village itself are all affected because it has seriously ruined their economy.
Map Info Display Text Original Text
Map Info Display Text Original Text
Map Info Display Text Original Text
Map Info Display Text Original Text
Map Info Display Text Original Text
Map Info Display Text Original Text
Map Info Display Text Original Text
Map Info Display Text Original Text
Map Info Display Text Original Text
Abraxas was born of pure crystal from Pagosia, but it became a vicious monster because of evil poachers who stole the life essence, soul crystals from the land.
The whole land is frozen but these spiritual trees survived. However, the whole forest is also in danger because of poachers. Someone said Avice was summoned to save this Rancorous Forest from them.

You cannot even see an inch in front of you because of continuous blizzard and the road is right next to dangerous cliffs where avalanches happen all the time. Old tales say that the lair of Legendary Khionos, the Ice Dragon is somewhere around this area.

Bear Claw Mine once prospered and was crowded with many tribes, but it is silent and hallow now. The mine was named after Alexyon the Avalanche, the famous furious bear who has frigid and sharp claws.

This is the place {C=0xFFFF0011/}Kalygon Fleet{C=0xFFFFFFFF/} where Captain Hookah and Captain Alvida took the treasures for Paris. For some unknown reason, they became enraged while carrying the treasures.
Map Info Display Text Original Text
Map Info Display Text Original Text
Map Info Display Text Original Text
Map Info Display Text Original Text
Map Info Display Text Original Text
Map Info Display Text Original Text
Map Info Display Text Original Text
Map Info Display Text Original Text
Map Info Display Text Original Text

This gorge is located near Kazeura village. Because of the beautiful scenery Taoists have lived here for centuries. There were many kinds of animals here that lived together in this untamed wildness, however, due to a recent contamination they have become furious. So please be careful out there!
Map Info Display Text Original Text
Map Info Display Text Original Text
Map Info Display Text Original Text
Map Info Display Text Original Text
Map Info Display Text Original Text
Map Info Display Text Original Text
Map Info Display Text Original Text
Map Info Display Text Original Text
Map Info Display Text Original Text
The Valley is East of Masiram mountain, where Kazeura Village is located. Drakan priests often come to this place for training. Thick mist has covered this valley for a very long time.
Map Info Display Text Original Text
Map Info Display Text Original Text
Map Info Display Text Original Text
Map Info Display Text Original Text
Map Info Display Text Original Text
Map Info Display Text Original Text
Map Info Display Text Original Text
Map Info Display Text Original Text
Map Info Display Text Original Text
Like an elephant death ritual, Dragons also have a special secret graveyard for their dead when the time comes. Dragon valley is a very peaceful place.
Map Info Display Text Original Text
Map Info Display Text Original Text
Map Info Display Text Original Text
Map Info Display Text Original Text
Map Info Display Text Original Text
Map Info Display Text Original Text
Map Info Display Text Original Text
Map Info Display Text Original Text
Map Info Display Text Original Text
After Elga's rebirth, all the dragon fellowships are heading to Edge of the world. Since a large number of knights were exterminated in one day by Elga, this place became a wasteland for a long time.
Map Info Display Text Original Text
Map Info Display Text Original Text
Map Info Display Text Original Text
Map Info Display Text Original Text
Map Info Display Text Original Text
Map Info Display Text Original Text
Map Info Display Text Original Text
Map Info Display Text Original Text
Map Info Display Text Original Text

From Fungoid Village to the Village of Ash Mist, there is a large valley famous for seeing Dragons. In the year 203, Vartik the third built his own castle and called the valley, Vartika Hill. Vartik the third and his family have disappeared due to the merciless Count Van Cliff.
You will need to equip novice set items or Ragnarök set items.
Blue Gemstone is required to enter.
You must equip the Advanced Ice Medallion to enter this Dungeon
You must equip the Hero Ice Medallion to enter this Dungeon
You must equip the Advanced Fire Medallion to enter this Dungeon
You must equip the Hero Fire Medallion to enter this Dungeon
You must equip the Advanced Dark Medallion to enter this Dungeon
You must equip the Hero Dark Medallion to enter this Dungeon
You must equip the Advanced Nature Medallion to enter this Dungeon
You must equip the Hero Nature Medallion to enter this Dungeon

Ice Guardians' Dungeon
Fire Guardians' Dungeon

Floor UI
Item Help UI
Can obtained by completing below steps.
Can obtained by defeating the Bone Dragon.
Can obtained by defeating the Black Witch Paris.
You can get the armour set from Elite monsters in Van Cliff Fortress
You can get the acccessory set from Elite monsters in Van Cliff Fortress

Count Van Cliff was a famous noble who owned a lot of property on the world of Dragotaka. But one dark night, a mysterious visitor arrived at his mansion. He made an agreement with this mysterious visitor and the count was cursed with black magic. He has remained inside his mansion guarding something ever since.

A Maze which serves as a prison for Dark Lord, Elga. Many heroes have ventured into Drakos to finish Elga off but no-one has found him so far. The only hope for now is that you can ask the Gem of Truth the exact place where Elga is sealed, which has the answer to all the questions in the world.
Van Cliff Fortress is an old castle that has been cursed. You can choose 3 different difficulty; Normal/Rare/Hero and according rewards will be given to you.
Drakos is a huge maze as known as Elga's Cabinet. You can choose 3 different difficulty; Normal/Rare/Hero and according rewards will be given to you.

The monsters inside the Ice Vault are filled with the power of the Ice Element. The frozen air from Ice Guardians' Dungeon freezes even the hottest of fires; But passionate adventurers keep coming in the hope of obtaining Ice Spirit Shards.

The monsters inside the Fire Vault are filled with the power of the Fire Element. Many adventurers have lost their lives in the blazing infernos of the Fire Guardians' Dungeon; But passionate adventurers keep coming in the hope of obtaining Fire Spirit Shards.

The monsters in Dark Vault are filled with the power of the Dark Element. Everyone who has entered the Dark Guardians' Dungeon never comes out the same, like a piece of them is left behind; But passionate adventurers keep coming in the hope of obtaining Dark Spirit Shards.

The monsters in Nature Vault are filled with the power of the Nature Element. The monsters can tangle and trap intruders inside forever; But passionate adventurers keep coming in the hope of obtaining Nature Spirit Shards.

Experience and learn the basic game play of Dragonica and meet the cute little helper Pororing who will guide you in the early stages. The wolf attack has struck fear into the people of Odelia. Do everything you can to help them.
The construction of the port which will connect the islands has been stopped because of monster attacks.

Jigsaw Pincers Coast used to be a hot spot for tourists because of its beautiful beach and great view of the port. Travellers are now afraid to go there since monsters have taken control of the place.

Decker Shark Piers is a very vivid place where you can find lots of Kalygon Fleet workers. But due to the frequent raids done by the pirates, the workers get cranky and took off with their cargo ships.
Steven Trading Port. The government purchased property near the port to make it a centre for trade. Due to a recent spate of pirate attacks, illegal goods have been pouring in.
The port was once a prosperous place but it was devastated when the giant nautilus appeared.
Kalygon Fleet was once known as an abundant trading place. It's now a shadow of its former self since Alvida and the pirates took over .

A temple was built to commemorate High Magician Mirinae, a war hero from the dragon war which took place a thousand years ago. His spirit has somehow resurrected and has started to brutally attack people in the area.

Skypie Sanctuary is a monumental temple for slain Warriors located near the shore. The Warrior spirits which have slept peacefully for a long time have risen to attack people travelling through the area. Rumour has it that one of the spirits wears an almost impenetrable armour developed by a legendary blacksmith eons ago.

A temple was built to commemorate the legendary thief Belkan, who had all he desired. Even though he was a thief, in the eyes of many he was a real hero who helped out the poor and needy while fighting for justice.
Parmir Sanctuary was built to commemorate the legendary archers of the past. Each year in the temple the flesh and blood of a live goat is offered up.

A plain in front of Odelia where locals have set up farming and related industries. You'll find large windmills and plenty of food storage there, but lately the area has been plagued by a spate of monster attacks.

A plain in front of Odelia where locals have set up farming and related industries. You'll find large windmills and plenty of food storage there, but lately the area has been plagued by a spate of monster attacks.
Advanced Windia Plains is where large farms and food storage are located. It was once a peaceful place, but the recent monsters incursions have destroyed the place.

Traitor's Ridge is where the hideout of the bandit brothers, Sanka and Kunka can be found. They had been maintaining a good relationship with the villagers until they suddenly started to attack the travellers in the area.
A small hill just after Traitor's Ridge where wild animals wander around frightening people.
The Wailing Hill is a place where countless battles have been fought over time. At night time, the spirits of the dead awaken and bring suffering to all who pass by.
The Canyon of Oblivion is the passage leading to Port of the Winds. Rumour has it that the bandits who attack travellers are under the curse of an evil witch.
A small beach located near the entrance of Port of the Winds. The place is quite the scene, with its beautiful scenery, blue water and fine white sand.

By travelers' testimonies who came back to Odelia because of wolf attacks, it seems like this could be where the wolves have their den. Some have also said that there is a wolf who can actually stand with 2 legs, like a human.
A traveler who recently got attacked by wolves said that he saw a werewolf around here. To use Edeline's Werewolf Cure, you have to get in to this den and defeat the werewolf.

Underground dungeon that leads to the laboratory of Dr. Farrell. The ventilation of the lab is somehow connected to the City Hall which is the reason why it was filled with poison gas. On the upper level of the lab you'll see different facilities and experimental monsters.

A doctor obsessed with his work, with a heart full of hatred and anger. The evil eventually leads him to use his own body for his experiments. Protect the village by defeating the crazed doctor who's under Paris' spell and find out all you can about the Red Dragon.

Once a successful magma mining operation, Dangerous Cave has fallen victim to the increased monster attacks in Dragotaka . Workers in the mines have been taken hostage by the Mole people and now their lives are in great danger.
The deepest part of the cavern where the purest water in the continent can be found. The water comes at a hefty price since you have to risk your life battling monsters to get it.
An old mining area where an ample amount of ore can be found. The place is no longer safe for humans due to the presence of monsters and poisonous gas.

The Water Temple is in the Port of the Winds. In the old days, the temple was open and known all over the continent. However it was closed suddenly and secretly. No one knows reason and it was slowly forgotten since then. However now Spirit of Water has awakened and guards the town.

The legendary Citadel of Torment is protected by cursed elite monsters' spirits and they are guarding each floor. You have to defeat them to proceed to a higher floor and investigate about Belkan's treasure from myth.

Where brave warriors of war rest in peace. Graveyard keeper Larell did pretty a good job in managing this historical place, but recently he is scared because of omnious sounds coming from underground.
It has been quite for a while since the monsters were defeated. But now louder and more horrible sounds are coming from the graveyard. Larell is getting very anxious.
Hookah and Alvida have started to attack the people near the shore of Port of the Winds. You must defeat them to protect the villagers.

Machine soldiers are guarding the legendary heroes buried in the sacred sanctuary. Rumours around Hero's Descent say that the witch Paris has left for Dangerous Meca in search of those soldiers. Head to Dangerous Meca to find out if the rumours are true.
Vagabond and Vegas have returned to Windia Plains knowing that the five heroes have left the area. Defeat them to restore peace in Windia Plains once again.
The main hideout of the bandits led by Sanka and Kunka.
Barlok's lair is located deep inside the Dangerous Cave. No one has ever survived a journey to Barlok's lair.

Typical port where you'll see a couple of establishments such as: a temple for praising Triton, a city hall, inn for travellers, equipment store, general store and the experts of each job classes. Beware, a mysterious scream can be heard around the city at night time.
The Warrior district of Odelia where melee experts such as the guard captain can be found. The sudden disappearance of Lylia added up to the troubles they're currently having with the wolf attacks.
The Magician district of Odelia where magic experts such as Pablo can be found. The sudden disappearance of Lylia added up to the troubles they're currently having with the wolf attacks.

The Archer district of Odelia where archer experts such as Adelio can be found. They put a lot of effort to keep the town secure but currently on high alert since the disappearance of the town leader's daughter, Lylia.
Backalley is the Thieves district where the likes of Jack can be found. The district has been busy lately, a huge bounty awaits for the one who can solve the mystery of Lylia's disappearance.

Moon light shore village is located between shore and sanctuary area. In order to go Libra, you have to pass this village. For some unknown reason, there is always a dark atmosphere and undead monsters will attack any fellowship.
The primary hub for trading between the continents of Elyades and Melanathos actively takes place. As soon as Paris appeared, the town fell into complete darkness and hasn't seen daylight since.

Valid Raeth is the habitat of the Red Dragon, Magma Drake Lavalon who is a loyal servant of Elga. Once a lush green meadow, Lavalon destroyed the area on his appearance. It is now a smouldering wreck of rock and magma.
The source of the magma stream; located in the deepest part of the abyss. The heat from the stream is so intense that anything that comes in contact with it is instantly incinerated.
An area devastated by a recent volcanic eruption. The unstable conditions have caused constant lightning storms whilst the ash in the air makes it extremely hard to breath.
These Magma swamps were caused by the solidified magma and are used as a base point for Rocker's troops.

The pinnacle of Dr. Farrell's research, Magma Drake Lavalon is an example of brilliance gone wrong. The artificial dragon draws its power from the nearby magma fields to produce a spectacular but lethal burning effect.
A dungeon equipped with various flame traps and magma hazards. Deep within the dungeon lies the entrance to the lair of Magma Drake Lavalon.
This swamp was once a beautiful lake with an abundance of nature. The magma field created by Lavalon destroyed all this and now only the strangest creatures can survive here.
Access to the dangerous Dried Woods Swamps is hampered by the amount of overgrown vines and dead wood blocking its entrance.

The appearance of Queen Vella has destroyed the delicate ecosystem of the swamp. A large amount of toxic reeds have infested the area. A local tribe have begun to utilize the toxic reeds for their poisonous properties.

Queen Vella's pet gators escaped into the swamp during a recent flood. Vella allowed them to stay there for her own amusement and they have since reproduced rapidly, endangering any travellers in the area.
A spell cast on the once friendly Smart Woodies has turned them all into violent ants. These ants have overrun the once peaceful forest and pose a grave danger to anyone in the area.
Trees that have absorbed the toxic nutrients from the swamp have grown excessively and have mutated into giant toxic vines.

The temperature gap between morning and evening at Misty Lane has been creating the fog around the region since anyone can recall. The consistent foggy weather has caused countless incidents in the past.
The forest is rapidly becoming extinct due to the brutal Woodsman Paul Burnaun. The king has organised a special unit to tackle the problem, they are forming a base camp at Pine Cone Hills.

Due to the reckless felling of trees by Burnaun, the forest that blocked the fierce northern winds has been decimated, forcing the locals of the village to flee their homes. Only Burnaun resides here now.
God's Sanctuary is where the ancient Gods have been laid to rest. Once a calm and peaceful place, the recent conflict amongst the Kentars has angered the Gods.
Collapsed Sanctuary was once a prosperous place but numerous battles have destroyed its once beautiful scenery. The ruins indicate the severity of the past conflicts.
The Remains of Trace is the remnants of a Kentar village, devastated from the countless wars fought by them. All the villagers left after the town well was poisoned in the most recent war.
An altar built to commemorate the legendary Kentar heroes. The Kentars gather each year to celebrate its anniversary.
Mutisha injected his soul into an Aram which is three times bigger than an average man. Mutisha chose this Aram to become the master of the dead.

The Myst Elves have once again surfaced in the human world knowing that the Aram created by their ancestors was controlled by an evil spirit. Their powers are somehow limited in the human world but they are willing to face the danger as long as they finish their task.
A Legendary Forest where the Mist Elf is believed to be living. Many Forest Spirits and the forest guardian 'Revious' are believed to be living here.
The Fungoid people's village. Fungoid village is known across Dragotaka for the variety of strange and unique goods it produces. The Fungoid people are known for their distrust of humans.
The Fungoid people used to inhabit this area. It is now a desolate place ruled by a band of corrupt fairies and hordes of monsters.

This place used to be a beautiful forest when the Fungoid tribe started settling in. One day, poisonous gas started to consume the place which resulted to Tutu flower trees getting contaminated. As a result, local creatures could not pass through the forest and contaminated forest fairies took over the place.
Used to be Fungoid tribe's quite park. It is now abandoned due to the poisonous gas and only contaminated fairies wander around.

The Village of Slumber was once a thriving Fungoid village but relentless monster attacks forced its inhabitants to flee. The Village gets its name from its new inhabitants, a band of monkeys who detest noise and like to live in a sleepy quietness.

Used to be a mushroom processing factory but only the ruins are left after the fairies destroyed it. Fungoid Mushroom used to be known for its recovery capabilities but now it became poisonous due to the contamination.
A barren and frozen wasteland, the Land of Temptation is said to be the home of an Ice Golem who turned the area into a frozen hell many years ago.

A ridge located between Land of Temptation and Frigid Canyon where blizzard constantly stays. Over the hill is the Frost Lake. Rumour has it that one may come across the legendary Frost Dear Fairy here.

Frost Lake is known as the ice fairies' resting place which is abundant of clean natural ice. Due to the fact that the ice here restores one's mana, many magicians try to visit the place, but many of them die due to hypothermia.
This castle is home to the Ice Queen. Local travellers have blamed the Ice Queen for the recent attacks by the Ice Fairies.

Only ice fairies are known to be able to reside here due to the extreme cold. Legend has it that there is a secret passage which leads to the castle of the Ice Queen. Many heroes have left for the passage, but none has returned yet.
Entrance to Drakos where Elga has been sealed and incarcerated. Elga's vile voice seems to be echoing nearby. The structure is a complex labyrinth to hide the place where Elga is sealed.

Machina Centre is located at the heart of Drakos which is maintaining the seal mechanism put on Elga. It seems there are mechanical devices consisting the place, but it is actually powered by the life energy of numerous magicians. The vengeful spirits of those who were sacrificed for Elga's seal lie here.
The top floor of Drakos is beautifully illuminated by the moonlight coming into the terrace. Along with the beautiful moonlight, the best of Paris' follower, Antares is guarding the final gateway.

Higher floor of Drakos. Ordinary creatures cannot stay here due to the severe environment. Out of the complex labyrinth is the top floor in which the secret tower is located. It only reveals the truth to the ones who seek it.

This luxurious mansion was once a property of a noble who used to possess great power and wealth as a close follower of the King few hundreds years ago. Even till 50 years ago, many visitors have come to the mansion every night. However, strange rumours started spreading about the mansion. Now, it is abandoned and no one wants to go there.
Used to be a residence area in front of the Van Cliff Fortress. Local residents left due to ghosts haunting the place every night. Only travellers and merchants get to see the village.
Rumour has it that Queen Vella originated here. It is also home to the dastardly Firefly patrols.
The forest guarded by elves located just beside the Forgotten Village.
The lake of Ice Fairies is also known as the Ice Queen's garden.
Rumour has it that there is a secret passage that leads to the underground level of Drakos.
Base camp located just beyond Frigid Canyon. In an attempt to attack Paris at Drakos, a number of troops have gathered there.
This is the first place after Ellora camp. The whole area is frozen and barren, no one would be here, however detective Gordon saw some creature in this place while investigating.

This place is where detective Gordon insists he saw the last trace of some creature. It's not certain if he actually saw a creature, there's no way any creature could survive out here surrounded by all these powerful monsters.
FrostSoul Avice lives in this place. Snow Fox tribe Captain, Blair, asked to get a Collection of spirits of Avice, but gave no clue where or how to use it.

The creature Gordon found was Snow Fox tribe. As Colin advised, the Dragon Fellowship should help Snow Fox tribe to gain their trust. If you're lucky, Snow Fox tribe could give people great help back.

Dragon Fellowship encountered Mist Elf tribe in Marshmallow Valley. Hel Krouzer, Mist Elf tribe Captain, said they followed certain atmosphere. He described the atmosphere as soul's energy, which is colder than Death.
As Blair asked, collected spirits of Avice. According to what Blair said, Feronos could be controlled by the collected spirit. What is Blair planning to do with the Ice Dragon?

Big bear Alexyon is living in this place. Same as Avice's case, Dragon Fellowship should obtain Collection of spirits of Alexandre, which Snow Fox tribe captain asked. Blair's real plan is still vague.

Ice Rock Hill is last place to stay in this continent. Because of what Snow Fox tribe Captain,Blair, said, Colin gave the order to the whole continent to find out Blair. Dragon Fellowship also helped, but information about Ice Rock Hill is almost zero.

Dragon Tribe, Drakan's Home town. This place had been isolated from outsiders by ancient magic from the Drakan tribe. Currenlty, it appeared from dense fog because of the Dark Witch's plot to steal the Precious treasure.

One of the hills between Fungoid Village and Village of Ash Mist. It has been known as a sacred place to see dragons for a long time. Vartika Hill is named after Vartike the third duke. Vartike the third duke was ruined by Count Van Cliff.

It's named as Vanshi Gorge because of the rumor that Ghosts come out when it's misty. Since the rumor spead continuously, people built small achurch. However, even the church cannot be seen currently.

This gorge is located near Kazeura village. Because of the beautiful scenery Taoists have lived here for centuries. There were many kinds of animals here that lived together in this untamed wildness, however, due to a recent contamination they have become furious. So please be careful out there!
The Valley is East of Masiram mountain, where Kazeura Village is located. Drakan priests often come to this place for training. Thick mist has covered this valley for a very long time.
In this corner between continents, there is a Drakan village, sealed from humans, which is called Kazeura. This area was unreachable for humans but due to diastrophism, it is now revealed.
Like an elephant death ritual, Dragons also have a special secret graveyard for their dead when the time comes. Dragon valley is a very peaceful place.
Once you depart from Ellora camp, you will come to Nail Hill which is connected to Edge of the world.
This gorge is called wing gorge due to its look. Recently this place is forbidden as evil spirits were found.
Since thousands of knights were exterminated in one day by Elga, this place became a baren wasteland for a long time.

Akia cave is a holy place where the God Eia created the first drakan with its gene and dragon's egg. There were 7 creatures initially, however, due to disobeying Eia they were sealed in the God's precious treasures.
One of the precious treasures is in this altar. Archpriest of Shadow Rue is its guardian. Some Drakan priests are heading to the cave as they found a lead about the precious treasure.
Ancient kingdom knights were dispatched to find the God's precious treasures. But this resulted in the awakening of the dragon that was sealed in Black Claw Nest, The Dark Dragon Lord Elga.
This place is where the Dark Dragon Lord Elga was sealed long ago. After Paris was defeated by Heroes, Elga chose this place to maximize his power.

{C=0xFFFF5917/}[Chocolate Storehouse]{C=0xFFFFFFFF/} The Storehouse is well known for being the biggest and best in Dragotaka. The people of Port of the Winds, as well as smaller villages all want the chocolates to give to their valentines but Coofie and his Chocolate Robbers have been stealing them! Help Yamaki by keeping the {C=0xFF00FFFF/}Chocolate Boxes{C=0xFFFFFFFF/} from the mysterious {C=0xFFFF0000/}Chocolate Robbers{C=0xFFFFFFFF/}.

Akia cave is a holy place where the God Eia created the first drakan with its gene and dragon's egg. There were 7 creatures initially, however, due to disobeying Eia they were sealed in the God's precious treasures.

This is known to people connected to the Haven. But at the end of the road there is a fierce door guardian called Cetirus. Lots of heroes attempted to pass Cetirus but none succeeded as they had to go back because they needed Special Equipment.

The Orc Field was just normal place that Orc Hero ruled. However, after the mysterious energy appearance monsters started to change and a crack in the dimensional fabric was found in the Orc Field. Now people cannot cross the field anymore! The tradition for heirs to leave their outfits for new starters is gone. A lot of Heroes from the Ragnarök world have tried to purify the Orc Field but they couldn't defeat the monsters with strong powers.

The Dungeon basement in Glast Heim is being dominated by the Dark Lord. Monsters near the Dark Lord have mutated and Glast Heim has became a more dangerous place. Furthermore, there's a Dimension shell, which was created by doctor Kaluza in the Glast Heim dungeon. To neutralize the Dimension shell the Avatar set that the Ork Field's heirs left should be equipped!

The Ice Palace only appears during winter. {C=0xFFFF0011/}Queen of Snow Batore{C=0xFFFFFFFF/} and her sister {C=0xFFFF0011/}Countess Mary{C=0xFFFFFFFF/} are living in the mysterious palace. However, due to the furious guard of the Ice Palace {C=0xFFFF0011/}Bear Dolly{C=0xFFFFFFFF/}, the place has never been exposed to the outside world.

If players work together to bring Santa Present Pouches to Rudolf, which are obtainable from the Ice Palace mission maps, then all players will be granted a server buff reflecting their achievement grade. The buff will be given during the following hours.
08:00-10:00, 11:00-13:00 14:00-16:00, 17:00-19:00 20:00-22:00

{C=0xFF790000/} Grade 1 (50 completions){C=0xFF4D3413/} Increase item drop chance by 10% {C=0xFF790000/} Grade 2 (100 completions){C=0xFF4D3413/} Increase item drop chance by 30% {C=0xFF790000/} Grade 3 (200 completions){C=0xFF4D3413/} Increase item drop chance by 50%
Server buff will be given for 2 hours. ($RemainTime$ mins left)
Server buff will be given for 2 hours. ($RemainTime$ mins left)
This is too bad! The server buff will not be given due to the low amount of pouches! -Rudolph- Cheer up please and pull yourself together!
Number of quests completed
Server buff will now be given for 2 hours.
1st grade is done! Go for 2nd!
2nd grade is done! Go for 3rd!
Final grade of the Cristmas quest has been done! Merry Christmas!
